title: Road: Markings
description: Replaces all glazed terracotta blocks with road markings.
body:
![Road: Markings by Z-Phyghtning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4581f3521769ad37ed40cc9278160c75ab01bfb6.png)

Ever wanted to build roads in Minecraft but didn’t have the right blocks? Still using gray concrete and smooth quartz stairs for road lines? Then this resource pack is perfect for you!

This pack replaces all glazed terracotta blocks with road markings to suit your needs — from single lines, double lines, arrows, and more!

Currently, the pack includes two marking colors: white and yellow.

![glazed terracotta blocks with resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e1a5521182d235196d1425a387eec18e3f753f6_0.webp)

![glazed terracotta blocks without resource pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e9f935dbd0bf5acf7c5aadbf10a220d2761c5f2.png)


<details>
<summary>Pre 1.20</summary>
  
![glazed terracotta blocks with resource pack (pre 1.20)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/50pA7Apw/images/436ddba2301f27298e883421afff44577adfb03d.png)

![glazed terracotta blocks without resource pack (pre 1.20)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/50pA7Apw/images/0ae3fe997c7f692cdd48352b614e0d6d675a3e0a.png)
